title: ononis spinosa subsp. legitima
intro: Ononis spinosa subsp. legitima, also known as Burnet or Burnet Saxifrage, is a plant species within the Ononis genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, offering benefits such as wound healing, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Burnet Saxifrage can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in folk medicine to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions.
